_readme: Append one object to 'winners' each month (newest first). The site renders newest-to-oldest automatically. Object shape: { "month": "2026-07", "label": "July 2026", "handle": "@winner", "prize": "e.g. 5 SOL", "announcementUrl": "https://x.com/..." or a Reddit post URL, "platform": "x" or "reddit", "reactionEmbedUrl": "optional X/Reddit post URL to embed inline, or null" }. While 'winners' is empty, the site shows a 'first draw' coming-soon state using firstDraw from raffle.json.
